data.title: Watercrest Fredericksburg Assisted Living and Memory Care Prepares for Grand Opening
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida on March 6, 2026, Watercrest Senior Living Group, along with partners Harbert Seniors Housing Fund II, LP and Centric Development, have proudly revealed the finished building of Watercrest Fredericksburg Assisted Living and Memory Care located in Fredericksburg, Virginia.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Weed Man/
data.description: Weed Man has announced a strong start to 2026 with record system growth, significant mergers, and strategic franchise expansion. The company reported significant changes and improvements, including a higher number of franchises and an increase in system-wide revenue. These developments come as Weed Man aims to solidify its position in the market and capitalize on opportunities for growth. This update was provided by the company in a news release issued on 24-Feb-2026.

data.title: BTC falls to around $68K as weak US job numbers don't help, losing gains from $74K high.
data.description: After reaching a high of $74,000, Bitcoin retraced its gains following disappointing labor-market data that failed to boost cryptocurrencies or other risky assets.

data.title: Food Pathogen Safety Testing Equipment & Supplies Market worth $13.25 billion by 2031- Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals significant growth expectations for the Food Pathogen Safety Testing Equipment & Supplies Market. It is forecasted to increase from USD 9.10 billion in 2026 to USD 13.25 billion by 2031, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.8%. This positive trajectory underscores the rising importance of safety testing equipment and supplies within the food industry.

data.title: WELL Health to Report Fourth Quarter and Year End 2025 Financial Results on March 19, 2026
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, WELL Health Technologies Corp. is set to reveal its Fiscal Q4 and Year End 2025 financial results on March 19, 2026, for the period ending December 31, 2025. The company, trading on TSX as WELL and OTCQX as WHTCF, aims to enhance health outcomes worldwide through tech-driven solutions for healthcare practitioners and patients. This announcement will be made before market open, providing crucial insights into the company's performance.

data.title: BBOT Announces Publication in Cancer Discovery Highlighting Preclinical Data Demonstrating BBO-11818 is a Potent and Selective panKRAS Inhibitor
data.description: The drug BBO-11818 is a non-covalent inhibitor designed to target KRAS in both active and inactive states. It has selective properties with high specificity towards KRAS over HRAS and NRAS. BBO-11818 demonstrates potent effectiveness in preclinical models with KRAS mutations, particularly those with the KRAS G12D and KRAS G12V variants. This inhibitor exhibits promising potential for treating KRAS-related conditions.

data.title: Here's What Owlet's Disappointing Outlook Says For 2026
data.description: On Friday, Owlet stock experienced a sharp decline following the release of a bleak forecast for the first quarter by the company specializing in wearable baby-monitoring technology. The disappointing outlook has raised concerns about the company's performance in 2026.

data.title: Lockheed Martin, RTX Land F-35 Contracts, Hover Near Buy Points
data.description: Lockheed Martin and RTX were awarded multiple contracts by the Department of Defense on Thursday to maintain the F-35 fighter fleet. The contracts are worth a combined total of millions of dollars. This significant deal signals the continued partnership between the defense companies and the government, highlighting the importance of the F-35 program. The news of these contracts has led to an increase in investor interest, with both Lockheed Martin and RTX stocks approaching buy points.

data.title: Oil Prices Approach $90 As Iran Holds Supply Hostage
data.description: On Friday, oil prices reached multiyear highs due to escalating tensions in Iran, causing a tightening of global supplies. This led to a rally among refiners, as well as U.S. and Canadian producers. As a result of the conflict, oil prices approached $90 per barrel, reflecting the uncertainty surrounding the supply chain. This surge in prices highlights the significant impact geopolitical tensions can have on the oil market, with investors closely monitoring the situation for further developments.

data.title: Day One Biopharmaceuticals Skyrockets On Servier's $2.5 Billion Buyout
data.description: In a significant move, Servier is set to purchase Day One Biopharmaceuticals for an estimated $2.5 billion, aiming to augment its range of cancer therapies. Following the acquisition news, Day One Biopharmaceuticals experienced a surge, reflecting investor interest in the deal. This acquisition marks a substantial advancement for Servier in the realm of oncology treatments.

data.title: Jobs Report: Payrolls Dive In Shock To S&P 500, The Fed And Trump (Live Coverage)
data.description: In the latest jobs report for February, there was an unexpected decrease of 92,000 in payrolls. Consequently, S&P 500 futures experienced further declines. This development has placed the Federal Reserve in a challenging position. The situation following the release of the Jobs Report with the sharp decline in payrolls impacting the S&P 500, along with the implications for the Federal Reserve and President Trump, is being covered live.
